global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo at the top, product placeholders in the center, and a strong call to action at the bottom.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a call to action for shopping.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'ThreadMark' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Product images
elements.description: A series of three empty product image placeholders arranged horizontally in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Product image placeholder
elements.description: A single empty product image placeholder, rectangular in shape, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Product image placeholder
elements.description: Another empty product image placeholder, smaller and rectangular, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Product image placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular empty product image placeholder, slightly larger, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Product image placeholder
elements.description: A smaller rectangular empty product image placeholder, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Circular element
elements.description: A small circular decorative element located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold text at the bottom of the ad that reads 'New collection drop Free Shop now', encouraging immediate action.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Fre e Shop now

elements.label: Shipping information
elements.description: A smaller text below the main headline stating 'Free shipping over $25', providing additional information.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, product images are centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
